title: Mario Paint Composer - Season Finale (Garfield - Caught in the Act)
description: I tried consulting the VGM rip of the Genesis version for this but that wasn't much help for the chords, so I kind of had to flub those. Otherwise pretty happy with this, heck it only took me an hour or two to throw it together, by far the fastest I've completed one of these yet.
